untranslatable_reason: Signal requires peer group comparison and relative performance metrics ('Market lags peer group by >1.5 days', 'Peer markets show strong directional move >1.5 std devs', 'Positive sector news confirmation') which cannot be expressed with single-instrument indicators. Multi-instrument correlation analysis and sector/peer relative strength are not available in the allowed indicator set.
translation_notes: Translated the core observable pattern from source text: a market that opens strongly (limit-up in example) but fails to sustain and closes in bottom quartile of intraday range despite favorable conditions. Used body_pct < 0.25 to capture the failed close in lower range. The peer comparison, lagging behavior, and news confirmation cannot be mechanically translated and would require external data feeds or multi-instrument logic.
